pages.title: Park Me: Draw Path
pages.description:
Draw precise parking paths to navigate complex urban parking lots in this casual browser challenge. Players plan routes by sketching paths to guide vehicles into tight parking spots, testing spatial reasoning and timing under increasing traffic conditions. Each level adds new layout puzzles that require careful path adjustments and quick decision-making to avoid crashes.

Key Features

• Path drawing vehicle control  
• Route planning and adjustment  
• Increasingly complex lot layouts  
• Time-sensitive parking challenges  
• Urban traffic environment
